title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform reliability improvements and enhanced troubleshooting capabilities. OpsPal now provides better session performance insights to help you identify and resolve workflow bottlenecks. We also streamlined the platform's internal organization and fixed several issues that could cause workflow interruptions.

entries.headline: New session performance scoring shows workflow bottlenecks
details: Track how smoothly your automation workflows run and identify areas causing delays
Get detailed troubleshooting information when workflows don't perform as expected

entries.headline: Documentation stays clean and organized automatically
details: Platform removes duplicate content and outdated information from your workspace documentation
Important sections always appear at the top for easier navigation

entries.headline: Resolved license renewal interruptions
details: Fixed issue where license renewals could get stuck in endless loops
You now get clear warnings 48 hours before your license expires

entries.headline: Organized and enhanced automation skill library
details: Updated 98 automation skills with clearer names and better organization
All skills now follow consistent formatting for easier discovery and use
